summary: Comprehensive testing of police overtime roster application completed. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including dashboard loading, tab navigation, officer selection with auto-populate, manual entry, admin login, and lock/unlock functionality. The app was recently refactored to use single-officer-per-row layout with 10 rows (teams AA,AA,BB,BB,CC,CC,DD,DD,EE,EE).

issues: Minor: Slot counter shows '0/10 SLOTS FILLED' even after reset - this is expected behavior after test

critical_code_review_comments: The refactored sheet structure (10 rows with AA,AA,BB,BB,CC,CC,DD,DD,EE,EE teams) is correctly implemented
Officers are properly sorted by seniority date (oldest first = most senior)
Auto-populate of Star and Seniority columns works correctly on officer selection
CST military timestamp is correctly generated for each assignment
Lock/Unlock functionality properly restricts sheet editing
Manual entry via 'Type Name' tab works correctly for non-roster officers
seed_data_creation: 50 officers seeded from Unit 214 roster via /api/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: App was refactored from multi-column (A,B,C,D per row) to single-officer-per-row with 10 rows total. All sheets (3 days x 3 types = 9 total) use same team structure. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_police_ot_api.py cover auth, officers CRUD, sheets CRUD, lock/unlock, bumped officers, and version logs.

tested_features.dashboard_no_login: PASS - Dashboard loads without requiring login
tested_features.tabbed_interface_sheets: PASS - RDO/Days EXT/Nights EXT tabs work correctly
tested_features.officer_dropdown_autopopulate: PASS - Selecting officer auto-populates Star and Seniority
tested_features.manual_entry: PASS - Type Name tab allows manual officer entry
tested_features.day_tab_switching: PASS - Switching days loads correct sheet data
tested_features.sheet_type_switching: PASS - Switching sheet types loads correct sheet
tested_features.lock_unlock_buttons: PASS - Only visible when admin authenticated
tested_features.backend_get_officers: PASS - Returns officers sorted by seniority
